name: Union Journeyman

abilities.name: Mining Ordnance
abilities.text: Once per activation. After resolving the Walk action, if this model is within 1" of a Scheme marker, it may discard a card to deal 1 damage to enemies within (X)1" of the marker, then remove the marker.

abilities.name: Unionized
abilities.text: While within 3" of another ally, this model receives a (+) to its Df and Wp duels.

actions.name: Powerful Tools
actions.costs_and_restrictions: The target may not drain (c) while this action is resolving.

triggers.name: Blow It to Hell
triggers.text: Remove all destructible terrain and markers within (melee)2" of the target.

actions.name: False Claim
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot be declared while engaged. Make two Scheme markers within range.

triggers.name: Union's Claim
triggers.text: An ally within 3" of a made marker gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Buddy System
triggers.text: Once per turn. Another ally with the same name as this model within range may make a Scheme marker within 3" of itself.

triggers.name: Overtime in the Mines
triggers.text: Once per turn. Deal 1 irreducible damage to this model. Draw a card.

extraction_notes: STN: 8 displayed below the character portrait
Model limit is 3 from Minion (3) characteristic
